basic_details.job_title: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Glass and Ceramic Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Central Glass and Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website cgcri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female and 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy layer).

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical and Electronics Engineering / Electronics Engineering / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering / Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering / Instrumentation and Control Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics Engineering / Nanotechnology or allied branches
qualification.details: B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical and Electronics Engineering / Electronics Engineering / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering / Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering / Instrumentation and Control Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics Engineering / Nanotechnology or allied branches. Desirable: Hands-on experience in micro/nanofabrication, thin-film deposition, lithography/FIB-based device fabrication, clean-room processing, electrical/electronic instrumentation, low-current device measurement using SMU/probe station, sensor testing, CAD layout, and data analysis using MATLAB/Python/LabVIEW. Exposure to biosensors, quantum-dot/nanomaterial-based devices or nanoelectronic sensors will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CGCRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Tech / B.E. in Electrical Engineering / Electrical and Electronics Engineering / Electronics Engineering / Electronics and Communication Engineering / Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering / Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering / Instrumentation and Control Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics Engineering / Nanotechnology or allied branches. Desirable: Hands-on experience in micro/nanofabrication, thin-film deposition, lithography/FIB-based device fabrication, clean-room processing, electrical/electronic instrumentation, low-current device measurement using SMU/probe station, sensor testing, CAD layout, and data analysis using MATLAB/Python/LabVIEW. Exposure to biosensors, quantum-dot/nanomaterial-based devices or nanoelectronic sensors will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable upto 5 years for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female and 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy layer).

content_sections.heading: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of application via email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR CGCRI is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.Tech or B.E. degree in various engineering disciplines such as Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Nanotechnology, or allied branches. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate - I position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA), depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I jobs?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the CSIR Central Glass and Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI).

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
